title: Manager Closes
description: A trust-first manager turn that protects the guest experience, resolves friction, earns a confident next step, and reinforces manager traffic control when showroom opportunities are active.
objective: Use a structured, low-pressure manager close to clarify truth, resolve concerns, align next steps, and protect every showroom opportunity through manager awareness, involvement, Save-A-Deal logic, and follow-up ownership.
position_in_journey: After Closing With Confidence → Before/During Numbers → Manager Traffic Control → Save-A-Deal if needed
learning_outcomes: Run a consistent manager turn that feels supportive, not confrontational.
Diagnose whether the issue is a question, concern, objection, or misalignment.
Use 'Unshakable Facts' to create clarity without pressure.
Resolve the real issue with one clean ask and a clear next step.
Keep team choreography clean: handoff, positioning, and roles.
Control active showroom traffic through manager awareness, timely involvement, and deal-flow inspection.
Apply Save-A-Deal logic to unsold showroom guests by identifying the real reason, next best action, owner, and follow-up time.
